af_score_components.notes: AP MCP Server (Associated Press?). Has MCP. News/media aggregation(?). Documentation moderate. Auth varies. Rate limits. Information access focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Media API auth. Public news data (no PII). Aggregation of licensed content.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Media provider reliability. Suitable for news automation.

api (generic). No MCP. Documentation moderate. Purpose unclear. Too generic to evaluate.
API MCP Server (generic). Has MCP. API abstraction layer. Documentation moderate. Auth varies. Rate limits inherited. Integration focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Abstraction layer (auth pass-through). Credential aggregation risk. Secret forwarding.

af_score_components.notes: API Tester MCP. Has MCP. API testing/validation tool. Documentation adequate. No auth (local). Rate limits for testing. Developer tools focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS for API calls. Test data could contain secrets. No sandboxing. Local tool. Credential handling in tests.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Test tool reliability. Suitable for API validation.

af_score_components.notes: api200 (unclear). No MCP. Documentation minimal. Early stage.
api2mcp4j (API-to-MCP Java tool). No MCP documented. Documentation sparse. Purpose for converting APIs to MCP.

security_score_components.security_notes: API adapter. Auth depends on wrapped APIs. Credential forwarding.

af_score_components.notes: Apidog Tests MCP. Has MCP. API testing platform integration. Documentation adequate. Auth for Apidog. Rate limits. Testing focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Apidog platform auth. Test data (could contain secrets). Fine-grained permissions. No credential exposure in reports.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Apidog platform reliability. Suitable for API test automation.
